entries.main_competence: 3.0 Demonstrate an understanding of devotion to God as revealed in the Bible
entries.specific_competence: 3.3 Demonstrate mastery of the Holy Scripture in the Book of Acts of the Apostles
entries.learning_activity: (a) Discuss the authorship of the Book of the Acts of the Apostles (author, recipients and purpose)

entries.assessment: The Author, recipients and purpose of the writing of the book of Acts of the Apostles are clearly discussed
resources: Bible and relevant biblical texts such as commentaries
entries.references: Bible Knowledge Syllabus for Ordinary Secondary Education, 2023 (Tanzania Institute of Education)
